en.extract:
The Sula pitta (Erythropitta dohertyi) is a species of the pitta. It was considered a subspecies of the red-bellied pitta.  It is endemic to Indonesia where it occurs in the Sula and Banggai Islands.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Sula pitta''' ('''''Erythropitta dohertyi''''') is a species of the [[pitta]]. It was considered a subspecies of the [[red-bellied pitta]].  It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]] where it occurs in the [[Sula Islands|Sula]] and [[Banggai Islands]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].

zh.extract:
苏拉八色鸫（学名：Pitta dohertyi），是八色鸫科八色鸫属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为近危。
苏拉八色鸫的平均体重约为60.0克。栖息地包括种植园、亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带或热带严重退化的前森林、亚热带或热带的（低地）湿润疏灌丛和河流、溪流。


参考文献
